victim.value: Lillian (Lilly), who died three days before the therapy session but somehow appeared to tell her story

closed_world.value: Therapy office where Faith conducts sessions with patients
closed_world.quote: Your name?" A loud half annoyed half-tired sounding old lady asks out sitting at the reception desk

investigator.value: Faith Lockwood, the therapist who discovers her patient was already dead
investigator.quote: Then who was the one that told me the ending of the story?" She asks herself now being part of a mystery...

red_herring.value: Lionel presented as antagonist through traffic incident and vacation disruption, but appears as new therapy client at end
red_herring.quote: Lionel becomes the bad guy in your mind... 'Mity, Lionel Mity.' The new customer answers.

clue_fairness.value: Reader given same information as therapist Faith - the complete vacation story and therapy sessions
clue_fairness.quote: So let me sum all this up. You decide to go on a vacation with your friends and your sister.

social_world.value: Therapeutic relationship hierarchy between Faith (therapist) and Lillian (patient) with institutional medical setting
social_world.quote: Well I am her therapist, Faith Lockwood, I was just wondering if I could talk to Lillian

reveal_mechanic.value: Phone call to mother reveals Lillian died three days ago, proving supernatural/impossible communication
reveal_mechanic.quote: Yesterday? Are you sure you have called the right Lillian? Lilly died three days ago.

investigator_wound.value: Faith's professional identity shattered by impossible patient interaction, questioning reality of her therapeutic practice
investigator_wound.quote: Then who was the one that told me the ending of the story? She asks herself now being part of a mystery...

_meta.title: ebook ameera butt what 039 s hidden within me
